overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a dimly lit medieval brothel or tavern interior with warm candlelight, red wallpaper, and wooden furnishings. The character walks through rooms populated with various NPCs before exiting to an outdoor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern main hall with patrons

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main hall of the tavern, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress holding a decorative fan, gesturing with it
shirtless man standing in the middle of the room

entered.detail: polished wooden plank flooring throughout the tavern
dark red wallpaper with ornate floral patterns covering the walls
medieval-style chandeliers with warm candlelight hanging from ceiling
wooden lattice screen windows allowing dim light to filter through
ornate wooden screens partitioning sections of the room

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through the main hall of a medieval tavern, passing various patrons including a woman in a green dress with a fan and a shirtless man. The space features warm candlelight from hanging lanterns, red patterned wallpaper, and wooden lattice windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating area with tables and vanity

events.description: turns left toward seating area with wooden tables and candles

agents.ego_description: moving through the seating area toward a vanity with a large mirror

notable_agents.action: man in brown vest standing near a table with lit candles

entered.detail: small wooden table with lit candelabras providing warm light
simple wooden seating near the table
ornate carved wooden vanity dresser with drawers
large circular mirror with decorative frame on top of dresser

segments.scene_description: Turning toward a seating area, Geralt passes wooden tables lit by candles and approaches a vanity area with a large dresser and mirror. Lattice windows line the back walls, and a man in a brown vest stands near the seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: vanity area with rug and buffet

events.description: turns away from vanity and walks toward the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: approaching the vanity to observe the woman, then turning to head toward the exit

notable_agents.action: woman in red lingerie adjusting her hair at the vanity mirror
man sitting in chair near the vanity area

entered.detail: wooden table laden with plates of fruit and food items

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a woman in red lingerie standing at the wooden vanity, then turns and walks past a buffet table laden with fruit. The dresser and mirror move to the left as he heads toward a darker corridor leading to the exit.

events.description: exits through doorway into bright outdoor medieval street

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and stepping outside into daylight

notable_agents.action: man in brown coat standing near the exit doorway

entered.detail: wooden door frame leading to bright exterior
timber-framed buildings visible through the doorway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a darker corridor toward the exit, Geralt passes a man standing near the doorway and steps outside into daylight, revealing medieval timber-framed buildings and transitioning from the warm interior to natural outdoor lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit, opulent medieval interior that eventually opens into a bright outdoor town square. It begins in a main hall filled with patrons and warm candlelight, moving past red patterned wallpaper and wooden lattice windows. As the camera turns toward a seating area, it glides past candlelit tables and a vanity mirror before shifting toward a buffet table laden with fruit. The scene then narrows into a darker corridor, passing a man stationed near the doorway as the warm interior glow begins to fade. Finally, the camera steps outside into the natural daylight, revealing a vista of timber-framed medieval buildings.
